Vaccination Record 2024: This document serves as the official immunization record for a 7-year-old patient as of January 2024. Vaccines administered include DTaP (5th dose), IPV (4th dose), MMR (2nd dose), and varicella (2nd dose) in compliance with the CDC recommended childhood immunization schedule. Influenza vaccine was administered on October 15, 2023. Next scheduled vaccines are Tdap and HPV series at age 11–12; parents were counseled on the importance of the HPV vaccine for cancer prevention.
